name: theanine
mechanism: EGCG inhibits catechol-O-methyltransferase (COMT) and activates AMPK; caffeine antagonizes adenosine A1 and A2A receptors.
summary: EGCG inhibits catechol-O-methyltransferase (COMT) and activates AMPK; caffeine antagonizes adenosine A1 and A2A receptors.
